channel.title: Twitter Timeline RSS
channel.description: 你的 Twitter Following Timeline（via opencli）

item.title: In a subsequent in-depth panel conversation, Rhea and Yixu Wang, CEO of Stellar Pictures, discussed ...
item.description:
In a subsequent in-depth panel conversation, Rhea and Yixu Wang, CEO of Stellar Pictures, discussed the intersection of AI technology and Eastern Fantasy themes.
Esther Yu expressed her delight in sharing the song with Cannes audiences, noting that the collaborative creation process had been a wonderful experience.
--- @Hailuo_AI | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 0 | 👁 10
item.author: @Hailuo_AI

item.title: The premiere featured a special appearance by Esther Yu, a member of "The Fleeting Beauty"...
item.description:
The premiere featured a special appearance by Esther Yu, a member of "The Fleeting Beauty" project team and a specially invited guest of MiniMax Hailuo.
With Jason Zhang, President and Producer of Stellar Pictures Rhea He, Head of Multimodal Model Marketing of MiniMax
--- @Hailuo_AI | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 15
item.author: @Hailuo_AI

item.title: 🌸MiniMax x Stellar Pictures x Guangming Daily feat. Esther Yu: The Universal Language of Chinese Art...
item.description:
🌸MiniMax x Stellar Pictures x Guangming Daily feat. Esther Yu: The Universal Language of Chinese Artistry
《The Fleeting Beauty》Music Video Official Launch in Cannes
A tale of two souls crossing through the cracks of time — ancient whispers meet modern hearts. From intricate character design to breathtaking art direction, we are proud to bring this story with stunning Chinese aesthetics to global stage.
#MiniMax #Hailuo #YuShuxin
--- @Hailuo_AI | ❤️ 0 | 🔁 0 | 💬 1 | 👁 18
item.author: @Hailuo_AI

item.title: 今天 GPT 5.4 遇到好多次“at capacity”，OpenAI 也遇到算力问题了？ https://t.co/Xff06dB3Oi
